text: Science has a clearer story about rainbows than social media does. When light hits water droplets, magic happens. But it’s all about physics. Every color bends at a different angle. That’s why you see the spectrum. Red shines at 42 degrees, violet at 40.3. That’s how you get a rainbow arc. Rainbows are nature’s art, but they follow strict rules of light and water. Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow for more!
